name: ExtensionEvidence_Certainty
title: R5: Certainty or quality of the evidence (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Evidence.certainty` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Evidence.certainty` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Evidence.certainty` 0..* `BackboneElement`
*  R4B: `Evidence.certainty` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Evidence.certainty` has a context of Evidence based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Evidence`.
Element `Evidence.certainty` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
